summary.key_theme: Netflix 財報雖優於預期，但因 Q2 財測疲軟及共同創辦人 Reed Hastings 宣布離職，導致股價重挫。

bullish.title: Netflix Supported by Pricing Increase, Ad Revenue, Stock Buybacks, UBS Says
bullish.reason: UBS 指出 Netflix 透過價格調漲、廣告業務增長及股票回購，仍具備穩健的長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Why Guggenheim maintains 'buy' rating on Netflix despite Q2 guidance miss
bullish.reason: Guggenheim 分析師 Michael Morris 儘管承認 Q2 財測疲軟，但仍維持買入評級，顯示對公司基本面信心。

bullish.title: Needham's Laura Martin shares the bull case for Netflix ahead of earnings
bullish.reason: 分析師 Laura Martin 在財報前提出看多觀點，強調其市場競爭優勢。

bearish.title: Why Netflix (NFLX) Stock Is Falling Today
bearish.reason: Netflix 因 Q2 財測不如預期，導致股價單日重挫 9.1 %，此篇報導涵蓋了財報後的市場反應，最具代表性。

bearish.title: Netflix is shifting into new era as Reed Hastings plans board exit
bearish.reason: 共同創辦人 Reed Hastings 宣布離職，引發市場對公司未來領導層與策略方向的擔憂。

bearish.title: Netflix Investors Disappointed With Unchanged Margin Outlook, MoffettNathanson Says as Shares Plunge
bearish.reason: 儘管成本基礎有所變動，Netflix 維持利潤率展望不變，令投資人感到失望。

bearish.title: Netflix faces 'fork in the road' as YouTube leads new media era
bearish.reason: 分析指出 Netflix 正面臨媒體產業轉型壓力，且面臨來自 YouTube 等平台的強大競爭。

neutral.title: Netflix (NFLX) Valuation Check After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
neutral.reason: 在財報公布前，分析師對其近期股價漲幅與估值進行理性評估，未帶有強烈多空傾向。

neutral.title: Final Trades: Netflix, BlackRock, Illumina and UPS
neutral.reason: 僅為投資委員會提及的觀察名單，未提供具體買賣建議。

neutral.title: Netflix reports earnings after the bell. Here's what to expect
neutral.reason: 財報公布前的預期性報導，屬於市場例行資訊。
